betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Electronium§f

§aThe last ingot-form material — pure electrons forged from dineutronium and the Book of Boxcars!§f

§bElectronium§f is the final material with an ingot form. After acquiring dineutronium and the §bBook of Boxcars§f, you can craft electronium. This material stores unbelievable amounts of energy — it is completely made out of electrons.

§6Crafting§f:
Placing §e2§f dineutronium ingots in the bottom slots and §e2§f §bIonized Particles§f on the top slots yields §e1§f electronium ingot.
This recipe is performed using the Book of Boxcars.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Made entirely of electrons — stores energy at near-infinite density
§b• Used for crafting the §bFEnSU§f (unlimited energy storage)
§b• Required for the §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bFEnSU§f — the ultimate energy storage device (requires electronium ingots)
§b• §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f — for digamma-based equipment
§b• Any recipe requiring electronium ingots

§eTip§f: Electronium is the last ingot-form material in the mod, but it's not the end. You'll need it in bulk for the FEnSU — each FEnSU requires 64 electronium ingots plus other rare materials. Stockpile ionized particles from your fusion reactor!
